title: BTC price four-year trend calls for $76K as analysis says Bitcoin 'not broken'
summary: Bitcoin research said that BTC price action remained in tune with previous cycles as the bear market produces a 20% discount to its four-year "adoption structure" trend line.

title: South Korea adds token securities to capital market overhaul
summary: South Korea’s Financial Services Commission has placed token securities infrastructure within a wider capital-market modernization plan covering faster settlement, longer trading hours and digital transformation.

title: Investors Maxing Out AI Trade Feed Stock Market Volatility
summary: Investors are maxing out the AI trade, setting the stock market up for a volatile summer.

title: Gold Drops to Near $4,000 on Stronger Dollar, Fed Rate Outlook
summary: Gold fell for a second day, extending losses to trade near $4,000 an ounce as a stronger US dollar continues to put pressure on prices.

title: Meet Qwable: The Free Local Model That Thinks Like Claude Fable
summary: Someone fine-tuned Fable 5's reasoning style into a local Qwen model. Then someone else removed its conscience.

title: Trump's Quantum Push Wins Praise, But Experts Warn Bitcoin Isn't Ready
